name: Pipeline A - Demo Call to Agent v1

nodes.name: Parse Transcript
nodes.notes: Normalizes transcript, detects call type, extracts company name

parameters.command:
cd /data && python -c "
import sys, json
sys.path.insert(0, '/data')
from scripts.parse_transcript import parse_transcript
from scripts.extract_memo import extract_account_memo
from scripts.generate_agent_spec import generate_agent_spec
from scripts.utils.storage import save_account_memo, save_agent_spec

transcript = parse_transcript('{{ $json.body.transcript_path }}')
memo = extract_account_memo(transcript)
account_id = transcript['account_id']

memo_path = save_account_memo(account_id, memo, 'v1')
spec = generate_agent_spec(memo, 'v1')
spec_path = save_agent_spec(account_id, spec, 'v1')

print(json.dumps({
    'account_id': account_id,
    'company_name': transcript['company_name'],
    'memo_path': memo_path,
    'spec_path': spec_path,
    'status': 'success'
}))
"

nodes.name: Extract Memo & Generate Agent Spec
nodes.notes: Extracts account memo from transcript and generates Retell agent spec v1
